_comment: ADR-077 SPA runtime config sidecar. This file is fetched from the same CloudFront origin as the SPA bundle at boot time. Copy to config.json for local development.
_doc: See hollowmark-docs/engineering/architecture/ADRs/ADR-077.md for schema and deploy instructions.

_notes.clerkPublishableKey: Format: pk_(live|test)_[A-Za-z0-9]+. Use pk_live_* for production, pk_test_* for staging/dev.
_notes.sentryDsn: Optional. Leave empty to disable Sentry (dev/test). Never leave empty in production.
_notes.sentryEnv: Values: production | staging | development. Used by Sentry and the beacon payload.
_notes.posthogKey: Optional. Leave empty to disable PostHog analytics (dev/test).
_notes.envLabel: Human-readable label shown in EnvBadge. 'production' hides the badge entirely.
_notes.daemonUrl: Daemon local API base URL with /api/v1 suffix. Stable channel: port 9001, staging channel: port 9011.
_notes.VITE_APP_VERSION_note: VITE_APP_VERSION and VITE_GA4_MEASUREMENT_ID are NOT in config.json — they stay baked at build time (ADR-075 §IV-3 byte-identity: these are artifact identity constants, not per-env runtime values).
